listing.title: This is a 1 bedroom, 3 bathroom, Single Family home. It is in the Grandview n...
listing.description: This is a 1 bedroom, 3 bathroom, Single Family home. It is in the Grandview neighborhood in Vancouver, BC.

signals.label: Missing location details
signals.why_it_matters: Listings that hide city/neighborhood are harder to verify and sometimes used for bait pricing.
signals.evidence: No city, neighborhood, or address hint provided

recommendedActions: Gather more info: ask for a live video tour, exact address, and a standard lease.
Compare the rent to similar listings in the neighborhood.
dataQualityHints: Add the full description text (fees, rules, viewing details).
redundancySteps: Result confidence is low: add missing details (URL, photos, full description) and re-check.
Do an in-person viewing (or live video tour) before sending any money.
Ask for the landlord/agent’s full name and verify ownership (land registry / property manager website).
Reverse-image search 2–3 listing photos to spot duplicates across cities.
Compare rent vs nearby similar units (same beds/baths) to detect bait pricing.
Never pay via e-Transfer, crypto, gift cards, or cash before the lease is signed and keys are verified.
If you have a lease draft, run it through the Lease Simplifier to flag predatory clauses.
